name: Basic Biscuits
recipeInstructions: Preheat oven to 450°F to 500°F. Sift 2 cups of flour with the baking powder and salt into a bowl. Cut in the shortening using a pastry blender or fork, or work it in with your fingers. Add milk until a soft dough forms, mixing just until the dough holds together. Flour your hands. Roll off pieces of dough the size of biscuits, dipping the wet edge into extra flour. Then roll or pat into biscuit shapes. Place the biscuits on a lightly greased baking sheet, slightly touching each other. Bake for 8 to 10 minutes until golden brown. Makes 12-18 biscuits.
